content:
+ how to homebrew your own team codes!

spreadsheet: https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1Lenpm6VoHS91u_kkFpVthN7lWxhkkbQxKLdgOGE4yBI/edit?usp=sharing
> *note: mobile may cause certain graphs to be out of position, viewing on desktop is best preferred

**__What makes a Teamcode?__**
created when you export or share a team, here's how teamcodes work, using a blank placeholder!

@@**[aaaa]**aaaaaaaaaaaaa@@
the first four are your awakeners, from left to right

@@aaaa**[aa][aa][aa][aa]**aaaaa@@
following that, the next two are wheels for character 1, then it continues for the next 6 slots, for every wheel equipped!

@@aaaaaaaaaaaa**[aaaa]**a@@
then it's the covenant sets in order for each awakener

@@aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa**[a]**@@
And the last one is the posse!

‘a’ — lowercase a is used for blank spaces, so the teamcode 
@@aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaah@@ is a blank team setup with the “voices in your head” posse setup!

lowercase 'x' and 'y' denote that the item/awakener that they're attached to is **two** alphanumeric characters long, so 'y1' is a single entity, and does not indicate a 'y' item

the spreadsheet has specific sheets for every part of the teamcode!

This is a good work, but isn't it the same base that is used in https://skeydb.com/?
Where you can put together a teamcode in the team builder?
I did work on that, yes! This kinda separates it a breaks it down though, I did check it with kada beforehand
Useful for ppl who want their own export system without having to fork SkeyDB <:Saya_yum:1513124263291387975>
Also the teamcode "base" as you call it is the one that the game uses, I just dissected it into its different sections and mapped them all

could be worth taking the time to compile a suggested WoD pool for every character that is then drawn from during the wheel generation rather than full inventory and character/WoD is either replaced if its a worthy substitute in that specific team or that team is disregarded as a suggested to use and moves to the next? maybe that way it would also not suggesting using characters that arent as invested into as others? bit like a priority order before generation occurs so having "meta"  teams + substitutes that fit each one as their own pool and before it just picks that team you have characters for, your inventory, character levels, E levels are viewed for how invested the account is into those and if X team is worth suggesting? Would take a bit of time im sure setting priority orders and the grouping of units, WoDs etc hope this makes sense and is at all helpful 🙏
yes, amazing idea!! i’ll definitely need more community input on this as i have a pretty limited pool of characters i play haha
for now i put wheel ranking according to mythag compendium, and yesterday i hopefully fixed the unit ranking priority to be investment first, then meta viability
very nice that should have helped a lot already
